2150790.name: Fantasia Medieval - Edição de Luxo
2150790.description:
This DLC contains all of the discarded graphic material that didn't get into the game, and a thank you letter in a separate folder, in the place the game was installed.

Medieval Fantasy was a surge of inspiration, which came with the emergence of artwork created by robots.

I've been wanting to test my writing on a Visual Novel for a while, so this new technology was the excuse I needed to create this adventure, which simulates a tabletop RPG session with friends.

It's a short story, with some ramifications that might spark interest in replaying from the beginning to see all the possible interactions.

This game is also a personal experience, to see the acceptance of the Brazilian public with Visual Novels, and to see the shortest possible time that I could create a game from beginning to end.

If your experience is worthwhile, consider purchasing the deluxe edition, which comes with extra high-res images and a Thank you letter.

Thanks for reading this far, I hope you enjoy the game!
2150790.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
